description:
Perform a capacity stress test on the Bologna Pasubio network using the configuration at /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/run.sumocfg. Conduct a baseline simulation and a stress test simulation with traffic demand scaled by 1.2. From both simulations, extract the maximum number of halted vehicles and the minimum average speed (considering only steps where vehicles are running). Generate a report at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/stress_test_report.txt using the following format:
baseline_max_halting: <value>
stress_max_halting: <value>
baseline_min_speed: <value>
stress_min_speed: <value>
